w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Reliability testing for repeated login, registration, and access control behaviour.
To verify that authentication-related functions remain stable and consistent during repeated use
This module is critical because it controls access to the system.
3. Sign in and sign out repeatedly for several rounds.
System continues to authenticate the student account correctly for repeated login attempts without crashing or misrouting access
3. Sign in and sign out repeatedly for several rounds.
System continues to authenticate the admin account correctly for repeated login attempts without error.
Reopen app after successful student login
System loads the correct access flow and preserves the expected account state after reopening.
Reopen app after successful admin login
System loads the admin-side access flow correctly after reopening.
Reliability testing for repeated listing retrieval and listing-related interaction.
To verify that marketplace functions remain stable during repeated access and page reopening.
This module is important because it supports the core item browsing and listing flow.
3. Reopen the marketplace page several times.
System continues to load the listing page correctly without missing or inconsistent listing results.
Repeat search with the same keyword
2. Search using the same keyword repeatedly.
System consistently returns the same matching search result without unexpected behaviour.
Reopen item detail page after leaving
3. Reopen the same item detail page.
System consistently displays the same listing information after reopening the page.
System continues to display the current user’s listings correctly without data loss or inconsistency.
Reopen My Item page after adding new listing
System retains and displays the newly added listing correctly in My Item after reopening.
correctly after the marketplace page is reopened or refreshed.
Notes: The test data presented in this

are provided as reference values for documentation. The actual data used during system testing may vary, but the field names and overall data structure are consistent with the implemented Firestore database.
Reliability testing for repeated chat access and message retrieval
To verify that chat functions remain stable and preserve message history during repeated use
This module is important because it supports continuous user communication
Reopen chat and retain previous message history
System retains and displays the previous message history correctly after reopening the chat.
Switch between Buy Item and Sell Item tabs repeatedly
System continues to display the correct chat lists without crashing or mixing the chat data.
Reopen application and access previous chat
System loads the previous chat correctly after the application is reopened.
Send messages repeatedly in the same chat
2. Send several messages one after another.
System records and displays each message correctly without interruption or failure.
Reopen chat detail after switching between conversations
System preserves the correct message history and item context for each chat conversation.
Notes: The test data presented in this

are provided as reference values for documentation. The actual data used during system testing may vary, but the field names and overall data structure are consistent with the implemented Firestore database.
Reliability testing for repeated booking actions and booking state consistency.
To verify that booking functions remain stable and preserve the correct booking state after repeated use or app reopening
This module is critical because it manages transaction coordination
Reopen app and retain booking details
4. Open the related booking details page.
System loads and displays the same booking details correctly after reopening the app.
Reopen chat and retain booking card status
System displays the latest booking card status correctly after reopening the chat.
Perform repeated booking requests on different listings
1. Open several chats for available listings.
System records each booking request correctly for the related listing without affecting other booking flows.
Reopen app after booking completion or cancellation
System preserves and displays the correct final booking status after reopening.
Buyer and seller view consistent booking status
1. Perform a booking action from one side.
2. Open the related booking details from both buyer and seller sides.
System displays the same booking status and appointment information consistently to both users.
Notes: The test data presented in this

are provided as reference values for documentation. The actual data used during system testing may vary, but the field names and overall data structure are consistent with the implemented Firestore database.
Reliability testing for repeated admin-side management functions
To verify that admin functions remain stable and preserve record consistency during repeated access and updates
This module is critical because it controls the administrative side of the system.
System continues to display the dashboard correctly without missing data or crashing.
Repeat access to user management records
System consistently displays the correct user information during repeated access.
Repeat access to listing moderation pages
System consistently displays the correct listing information during repeated access.
System consistently displays the correct complaint records and details during repeated access.
Reopen category management page after update
1. Add or update a category or subcategory.
System retains and displays the updated category or subcategory data correctly after reopening the page.
Notes: The test data presented in this

are provided as reference values for documentation. The actual data used during system testing may vary, but the field names and overall data structure are consistent with the implemented Firestore database.
Reliability testing for repeated sustainability data retrieval and display
To verify that sustainability information remains stable and consistent during repeated access
This module is important because it presents the sustainability value of the system.
System continues to display the sustainability page correctly without inconsistent values or errors.
Reopen sustainability page after completed transaction update
System consistently displays the updated sustainability information after repeated access.
System consistently displays the same sustainability information for the selected year without error.
System continues to display the admin sustainability information correctly during repeated access.
